content: Java项目统一使用Google Java Format进行代码格式化，缩进为2个空格，行宽限制120字符，所有public方法必须添加Javadoc注释
Spring Boot项目采用分层架构：Controller层处理HTTP请求，Service层封装业务逻辑，Repository层负责数据访问，各层之间通过接口解耦
使用Builder模式构建复杂对象，避免构造函数参数过多。配合Lombok的@Builder注解可以减少样板代码，提高代码可读性
IntelliJ IDEA中配置Save Actions插件，保存时自动格式化代码、优化import语句、添加final修饰符到局部变量
项目中所有REST API遵循统一响应格式：{code, message, data}，成功返回200，业务异常返回对应错误码，系统异常返回500
微服务之间通过消息队列RabbitMQ进行异步通信，使用死信队列处理失败消息，确保消息不丢失且支持重试机制
数据库敏感字段必须加密存储，使用AES-256-GCM算法，密钥通过环境变量注入，禁止硬编码在代码或配置文件中
单元测试覆盖率要求：核心业务逻辑不低于80%，工具类不低于90%，使用JUnit 5 + Mockito框架，测试方法命名采用should_xxx_when_xxx格式
使用Docker Compose管理本地开发环境，包含MySQL、Redis、RabbitMQ等基础服务，通过.env文件配置端口映射避免冲突
项目采用策略模式处理不同类型的消息推送：邮件、短信、企业微信，通过Spring的依赖注入自动装配对应策略实现类
REST API endpoints should use plural nouns for resources, support pagination via limit/offset parameters, and return proper HTTP status codes for each operation
Integration tests should use Testcontainers for database dependencies, ensuring test isolation. Each test class gets a fresh container instance to prevent state leakage
Kubernetes deployment uses rolling update strategy with maxSurge=1 and maxUnavailable=0. Health checks configured with readiness and liveness probes on /actuator/health endpoint
All API endpoints must implement rate limiting using Token Bucket algorithm. Default limit: 100 requests per minute per user. Critical endpoints like login have stricter limits of 10 per minute
Use the Repository pattern with Spring Data JPA. Custom queries should prefer @Query annotation with JPQL over native SQL. Complex queries can use Specification API for dynamic filtering
Git workflow follows trunk-based development. Feature branches prefixed with feat/, bugfix branches with fix/. All merges require pull request review by at least one team member
Application monitoring uses Prometheus for metrics collection and Grafana for visualization. Custom metrics should follow naming convention: app_module_action_unit format
CI/CD pipeline stages: lint -> unit-test -> build -> integration-test -> security-scan -> deploy-staging -> deploy-production. Each stage must pass before proceeding to the next
JWT tokens for API authentication expire after 1 hour. Refresh tokens valid for 7 days. Token rotation enabled: each refresh generates new refresh token and invalidates the old one
Performance testing with JMeter targets: API response time p95 < 200ms, throughput > 500 req/s under normal load. Load test results must be reviewed before each major release
